## SQL Safety

- [ ] Uses parameterised queries for values
- [ ] Uses proper identifier quoting for table/column names
- [ ] No raw string interpolation of untrusted input

- [ ] No tests needed

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is focused and limited in scope

- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
